generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance DimableLEDLightingFixture : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Dimable LED lighting fixtures integrated in the BIM model, controlled via Eclipse Hono/Ditto."
]
instance HVACValveActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "HVAC valve actuator represented in the enriched BIM model, used to adjust airflow."
]
instance HVADDamperActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "HVAC damper actuator represented in the enriched BIM model, used to regulate doors."
]

// C3: Physical sensing components
instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Occupancy sensor modeled in BIM and streaming via Eclipse Hono to the Digital Twin."
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancySensorDataTransmitted
]
instance PhotopicLightLevelSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Photopic light level sensor modeled in BIM and streaming via Eclipse Hono to the Digital Twin."
    DTDFVocab:producedData PhotopicLightLevelSensorDataTransmitted
]
instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Temperature sensor modeled in BIM and streaming via Eclipse Hono to the Digital Twin."
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureSensorDataTransmitted
]
instance CO2ConcentrationSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "CO₂ concentration sensor modeled in BIM and streaming via Eclipse Hono to the Digital Twin."
    DTDFVocab:producedData CO2SensorDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction
instance OccupancySensorDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]
instance PhotopicLightLevelSensorDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PhotopicLightLevelSensor
]
instance TemperatureSensorDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]
instance CO2SensorDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CO2ConcentrationSensor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance IFCBasedBIMEnrichedModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Core Digital Twin model: IFC-based BIM enriched with control semantics."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DittoDataStoreEnabler
]
instance StateMachineBCSModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "State machine model of Building Control System (BCS) stored in the Ditto twin store."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DittoDataStoreEnabler
]
instance SensorTelemetryModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Telemetry model derived from sensor data streams."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DittoDataStoreEnabler
]
instance ConfigurationMetadataModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Configuration metadata model extracted via Hono/Ditto Configurator."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DittoDataStoreEnabler
]

instance OccupancySensorDataStore : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Occupancy data persisted in the Ditto twin store."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DittoDataStoreEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancySensorDataTransmitted
]
instance PhotopicLightLevelDataStore : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Photopic light level data persisted in the Ditto twin store."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DittoDataStoreEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData PhotopicLightLevelSensorDataTransmitted
]
instance TemperatureDataStore : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Temperature data persisted in the Ditto twin store."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DittoDataStoreEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureSensorDataTransmitted
]
instance CO2DataStore : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "CO₂ concentration data persisted in the Ditto twin store."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DittoDataStoreEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData CO2SensorDataTransmitted
]

// C11: Enablers
instance DittoDataStoreEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler that interfaces with the Ditto twin store to persist and expose runtime data."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringDashboard,
        UnrealEngine5Visualization,
        BOREALISOptimizationEngine,
        PredictiveAnalyticsService,
        EnvironmentSimulationService,
        FacilityOperationalAnalyticsService
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeMonitoringDashboard : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real‑time monitoring dashboard displaying live status of building systems."
    DTDFVocab:provides OccupancyInsight,
        LightLevelInsight,
        TemperatureInsight,
        CO2Insight
]
instance UnrealEngine5Visualization : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization engine in UnrealEngine5."
    DTDFVocab:provides LightingZoneVisualization,
        HVACZoneVisualization
]
instance BOREALISOptimizationEngine : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Reinforcement‑learning based lighting control engine from BOREALIS."
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalLightingScheduleInsight,
        HVACSetpointAdjustmentInsight
]
instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics service for maintenance and energy forecasting."
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveMaintenanceAlertInsight,
        EnergyConsumptionForecastInsight
]
instance EnvironmentSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation service for environmental performance analysis."
    DTDFVocab:provides EnvironmentalPerformanceInsight
]
instance FacilityOperationalAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Operational analytics service for facility management."
    DTDFVocab:provides FacilityDecisionSupportDashboardInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance OccupancyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight visualizing real-time occupancy trends."
]
instance LightLevelInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight visualizing photopic light level variations."
]
instance TemperatureInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight visualizing temperature dynamics."
]
instance CO2Insight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight visualizing CO₂ concentration levels."
]
instance LightingZoneVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "3D visualization of individual lighting zones."
]
instance HVACZoneVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "3D visualization of individual HVAC zones."
]
instance OptimalLightingScheduleInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimal lighting schedule derived from RL-based optimization."
]
instance HVACSetpointAdjustmentInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Recommended HVAC setpoint adjustments based on optimization."
]
instance PredictiveMaintenanceAlertInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive maintenance alerts for critical equipment."
]
instance EnergyConsumptionForecastInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Forecasted energy consumption for upcoming periods."
]
instance EnvironmentalPerformanceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulation‑based environmental performance insights."
]
instance FacilityDecisionSupportDashboardInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Decision‑support dashboard for facility managers."
]

// Environment definition
instance BuildingEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains OccupancySensor,
        PhotopicLightLevelSensor,
        TemperatureSensor,
        CO2ConcentrationSensor,
        DimableLEDLightingFixture,
        HVACValveActuator,
        HVADDamperActuator
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control directives generated by the DT—e.g., lighting dimming levels, HVAC setpoints, or schedule adjustments—are transmitted back to the physical system through Ditto’s command channel over Hono, enabling bidirectional interaction."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous real‑time data streaming at millisecond‑level update rates for telemetry, with higher‑level optimization and scenario simulation executed on a continuous or event‑driven basis; synchronization between PT and DT is maintained via Hono/Ditto in near‑real‑time."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "An orchestrated ecosystem consisting of the enriched BIM, Hono/Ditto middleware, 3D real‑time rendering in UE5, microservice‑based actuators, and extension points for custom analytics services; all components communicate through defined MQTT topics and APIs."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin covers the full building life‑cycle: (1) Design—modeling of ideal as‑designed BIM; (2) Construction—mapping of as‑built BIM and device configuration; (3) Operation—runtime monitoring, optimization and data‑driven maintenance."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model validity is verified by comparing BIM topology against as‑built measurements; synchronization fidelity is monitored via the Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric; semantic drift is mitigated using runtime metadata checking; uncertainty from sensor noise is filtered by pre‑processing pipelines."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Bidirectional MQTT communication over TLS, using Eclipse Hono endpoints to route telemetry and command messages to Ditto twin topics; data flows via REST/HTTP for configuration and via CoAP for lightweight control where needed."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin is deployed in a containerised microservices stack, orchestrated by Kubernetes on a cloud or on‑premises edge gateway; Ditto twin store and Hono broker run in separate pods, with Unreal Engine rendering service accessible via WebSocket."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Integration with external BMS, building analytics platforms, and external data sources via standard MQTT/HTTP APIs, enabling data exchange with other Digital Twins or enterprise systems; the platform supports cross‑domain interoperability through open standards."
]

instance data_ownership_and_privacy : DTDFVocab:DataOwnershipPrivacy [
    base:desc "Sensor data originates from the building operators and is owned by the PT owner; the DT service provider stores and processes data in compliance with GDPR, ensuring privacy controls and access governance."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The engineering workflow follows BIM IFC standards for geometry, uses the Ditto data schema, and conforms to MQTT and REST communication standards; the model‑driven approach applies MDE best practices and leverages the ODTE metric for interoperability assessment."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Secure communication is enforced via TLS encryption and fine‑grained access control in Hono and Ditto; operation safety is ensured by implementing fail‑safe controls, redundancy and runtime validation before pushing commands to physical devices."
]
